stemHtml: A passenger has illegally brought a loaded firearm into the cabin. After landing, you made the mandatory occurrence report through the operator, but are there any other reports that must be made?

options.a: Yes, a report must be made to the ATS unit.
options.b: Yes, a report must be made to the AIS.
options.c: Yes, a report must be made to the designated competent authorities.
options.d: No, no further reports must be made.
